text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I started as a trainer here at Tracen Academy only a few days ago.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's peaceful watching the students practice while I fantasize about my
own glorious days to come...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I'm hopeful that I'll soon become someone's trainer, and help them
grow into an excellent racer. That is, until...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: URRRAAAGH! OUTTA MY WAY!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Huff... pant... Crud... Where are ya?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Barnacles! I don't see 'em! I'm positive my Golshi Radar was pinging in
this direction...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Radar alert... Radar alert... Trainer signal detected.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
No doubt—that's a radar ping, all right! There's a trainer somewhere
close by!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
But... where? If I remember right, trainers are green creatures with
big, pointy fangs...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah-ha!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I make eye contact with the oddball student... I've got a bad feeling
about this.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Hey, you there. You're a trainer, right?
choice_data_list: Well, I don't have green skin or pointy fangs...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Whaddya mean? You're wearing a trainer badge, so that makes
you a trainer, doesn't it?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Geez, you need to quit the nonsense. You might get kidnapped by
students looking to be scouted...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: —Students like me! The esteemed Gold Ship!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Resistance is futile! No way I'm letting a wild trainer run free!
RAAAGH!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The one who calls herself Gold Ship is getting way too close! This
could be dangerous!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I might be in actual danger—I'd better get out of here, fast!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Ah! Hey, you! Hold it right there!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: I manage to escape behind the main hall. It seems I've lost her.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What was that all about?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Excuse me... Are you all right?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: You're quite out of breath. Did something happen?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Goodness, Gold Ship was?! Well, how should I put this... You have my
sympathies.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I have to ask—how is it that you found yourself in such a
predicament?
choice_data_list: I think she's looking for a trainer...
I think she's looking for a trainer...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
That makes sense... You see, she has a strong desire to debut and
start racing.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Having a trainer is an essential step to running in official races.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Gold Ship, however, hasn't found one yet. Or rather... how should I
put this? She can't hold on to one.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
Anyway, in her efforts to find a trainer, she's likely resorted to trying
to kidnap one...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: It seems like Gold Ship is a real troublemaker around the school.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She seriously wants to race, which is great and all, but I can't imagine
I'd be able to handle her...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: URAAAAGH! Where's that wild trainer?!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Oh no... I think she's caught up to you!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text:
I can't get embroiled in this mess, so you'll have to pardon me. Do try
your best to stay safe!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: GRAAAAAARGH! Where are you?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Not good! I gotta make a break for it! I hope she doesn't see me...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oho! A wild trainer appears! ♪

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: You're mine now—

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Swoosh!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Woohoooo! A successful hunt!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Aww, don't wuss out on me now. It's not like I caught you to fill my
belly or anything.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
I'm just gonna take you on a teensy-weensy, kinda-huge adventure.
Now that you're caught up on the details, all aboard!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Still crammed in a bag, I get carried off to who knows where...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Several hours later...

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Ding ding! What a day! Bright an' shiny! This is the perfect weather to
search for treasure!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Okey dokey, Golshi's super... exciting... awesome treasure hunt
begins... NOW!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: What the... Where am I?! To be continued
